nasb.text: Immediately I was in the Spirit; and behold, a throne was standing in heaven, and One sitting on the throne.

esv.text: At once I was in the Spirit, and behold, a throne stood in heaven, with one seated on the throne.

cnv.text: 立刻，我在靈裡，就看見有一個寶座，設立在天上，有一位坐在寶座上。

ccb.text: 我便立刻被圣灵感动，看见天上安设着一个宝座，有一位坐在宝座上，

csbs.text: 我立刻就在灵里了，看哪，有一个宝座安放在天上，有一位坐在宝座上。
